description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named branch that triggers on push events to branches matching branch-* and tags matching v[0-9][0-9].[0-9][0-9].[0-9][0-9]. The workflow has concurrency controls to cancel in-progress jobs for the same workflow and ref. It consists of three jobs: cpp-build, python-build, and upload-conda. The cpp-build job uses a shared C++ build workflow with build type branch. The python-build job depends on cpp-build and uses a shared Python build workflow with build type branch. The upload-conda job depends on python-build and uses a shared workflow to upload conda packages for branch builds.
